title: net/url References, Escaping, Host Identity, and Conservative Keys · Independent Go Trial

Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of Go URL identity and scope admission pipeline with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explic…
objectives: Use net/url parsing while distinguishing scheme, opaque data, userinfo, host, port, Path, RawPath, RawQuery, and Fragment.
Resolve reference forms against final response and valid document base URLs while retaining raw and resolved provenance.

steps.title: Authorized site auditing and Go Extend the cumulative artifact · Lab Url Key Policy
steps.instruction:
Append a compile-ready pure-Go function headed "// Evidence: crawler-go-url-key-policy-13lron" that uses case 7870 to reconcile net/url structure, references, escaping, IDNA, host identity, and conservative keys. Return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not open sockets, resolve DNS, import x/net/html, goquery, Colly, or robotstxt, access host files, retain credentials, launch processes or unbounded goroutines, or claim native parser, race, load, accessibility, privacy, legal, container, restore, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Go 1.26.5, x/net 0.57.0, goquery 1.12.0, Colly 2.3.0, robotstxt 1.1.2, original fixtures, custom RoundTrippers, httptest servers, controlled DNS and browser-service environments, race and fuzz runs, subprocesses, inspected binaries and containers, accessibility review, capacity, backup, restore, rollback, legal review, and release gates.
